commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `chat.startup` gateway RPC that returns chat history plus the initial agents list, then has Control UI use it during the first chat refresh while retaining `chat.history` fallback paths.

PR surface: Source +136, Tests +177. Total +313 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer PR for a new startup optimization, not a bug report with a current-main failure to reproduce. I verified the current-main baseline lacks `chat.startup` and reviewed the branch's source-level behavior and tests.
commands.review_followup: - Maintainer-authored draft with a protected label and additive gateway startup surface should stay in human review until draft completion and compatibility proof are accepted.

target.title: perf(control-ui): hydrate chat startup state
target.body:
Summary
- Add a startup chat RPC that returns chat history plus the initial agents list in one gateway round trip.
- Let Control UI request that startup payload for the first chat refresh, skip the separate agents.list call when it succeeds, and fall back to chat.history for older/unadvertised gateways.
- Cover the clean first-message race, stale agent-list error clearing, startup method fallback, and server payload shape.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods.control-plane-rate-limit.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --pretty false --noEmit
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --pretty false --noEmit
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs <changed files>
- git diff --check
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
target.author: vincentkoc
